FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Comp Update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Refactors the mod to rely more on WorldObjectComps instead of a central WorldComponent.

patchNoteLines.li: Breaks down the monolithic WorldComponent into a handful of WorldObjectComps

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Toggle Update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Makes each of the submod's integration features individually toggle-able.

patchNoteLines.li: Adds individual toggles for each of the integration mechanics

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: API Updates
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Update the code to handle API changes in the base mod.

patchNoteLines.li: Various API changes such as *Registry -> EmpireRegistry and FactionCache -> FindFC

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Obselesence Update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Replaces the choose-a-defender float menu with opening up the base mod's choose-a-defender window.

patchNoteLines.li: Entirely removes OutpostDefenderGizmo, replacing it with a call to Dialog_DefendSettlement
Replaces an obsolete reference to settlementFCDefending in FindAttackEvent() with linkedOperation?.targetObject

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Off-surface Settlements
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Allows settling appropriate Empire settlements on non-surface layers even when the "Can only found on VOE Towns" restriction is enabled. Otherwise, orbital settlements are entirely blocked off.

patchNoteLines.li: Change the IsValidTileForNewSettlement prefix to only apply to tiles on the surface layer

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: PlanetTile Update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Updates the mod to use PlanetTile instead of int wherever possible. Rimworld allows for PlanetTile to be cast down to an int, but you lose layer info when you do that, which is a bad thing when it's possible to have Empire settlements on multiple different layers.

patchNoteLines.li: Updates the mod to use PlanetTile instead of int

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Road-builder Compat
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Adds compatibility with Empire's road builder. When enabled, VOE outposts will be included in the road network calculations, and roads will be built between them and Empire settlements.

patchNoteLines.li: Add compat support with Empire's road builder

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Updates & Info
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Removes two subsystems that are now obsolete in the base mod, and adds Codex entries for the mod's mechanics

patchNoteLines.li: Remove cooldown-reduction from Encampments (cooldown in the base mod is now mostly based on travel distance)
Remove the threat-scaling contributor (the base mod doesn't use threat scaling anymore)
Add numerous Codex entries

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Town Fixes & Config
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Folds in my own older mod, "Vanilla Outposts Expanded: Settings for Towns". Includes a bugfix for towns, as well as expanded configuration for them to replace the hard-coded constants of "3 settlements within 10 tiles".

patchNoteLines.li: Fold in "Vanilla Outposts Expanded: Settings for Towns"

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Outpost Conversion Expansion
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Rework how the outpost -> settlement conversion mechanism works. Includes better UI integration, as well as the possibility for non-Town outposts to be turned into settlements.

patchNoteLines.li: Rework the outpost -> settlement conversion mechanism to integrate better with the UI and support more outposts than just Towns

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: More Science!
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Lifts a restriction on research outposts.

patchNoteLines.li: Allow more than one research outpost to link to a settlement

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Fixes & Updates
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Handful of bugfixes and balance tweaks.

patchNoteLines.li: Officially rename the mod to "Empire Refactored: Outposts & Settlements"

Town outposts can be set to only recruit pawns that match the xenotype or race of the current inhabitants, at a reduced chance of recruitment. Not really an Empire feature, but if we're already touching VOE, then why not?
Change how military level is calculated: it is now based on similar logic as squads in the base mod, that being level is derived from the cost of all the pawns in the outpost
Defensive Outpost military efficiency calculations were simplified (it's linear now) with a higher floor and slightly lower ceiling
Defensive Outposts now show their combat efficiency in their world map infobox
Fix an issue where some modifier tooltips weren't colorized correctly
Tax notifications now respect the base mod's tax notification setting (letter vs message)

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: New Features, UI, and Fixes
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Adds a few new features, and new UI to more easil engage with the mod.

patchNoteLines.li: Expand the "Science outpost link" functionality to be a general resource-linking system, where certain outposts can link to a settlement and forego their item production to instead provide Empire resource production to the settlement
Add a "Defensive Aura" to Defensive Outposts, only active when they aren't audo-defending or otherwise busy. The aura applies a small military level bonus to all Empire settlements within range
Add settlement window- and main tab- UI for settlement-outpost linking
Update some Codex entries
